traits.name: Undead Thralls
traits.desc: When the necromancer casts Animate Dead, it can target one additional corpse or pile of bones, creating another zombie or skeleton, as appropriate.

traits.name: Dark Devotion
traits.desc: The necromancer has advantage on saving throws against being charmed or frightened.

actions.name: Dagger
actions.desc: Melee Weapon Attack: +2 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 4 (1d4 + 2) piercing damage.

actions.name: Necrotic Touch (Recharge 5–6)
actions.desc: Melee Spell Attack: +6 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 21 (6d6) necrotic damage.

reactions.name: Shield (1st-level spell; Reaction)
reactions.desc: The necromancer can cast Shield to gain +5 to AC until the start of its next turn.

monsters.name: Captain Teron Veyne
monsters.damage_resistances: Psychic; Bludgeoning, Piercing, and Slashing from nonmagical attacks

traits.name: Commanding Presence
traits.desc: Allies within 30 ft. of Veyne have advantage on saving throws against being frightened or charmed.

traits.name: Unshakable Authority
traits.desc: Veyne has advantage on saving throws against spells and magical effects. Once per day, he can choose to automatically succeed a saving throw.

traits.name: Indomitable (3/Day)
traits.desc: If Veyne fails a saving throw, he can choose to reroll it.

actions.name: Multiattack
actions.desc: Veyne makes three attacks with his longsword.

actions.name: Longsword
actions.desc: Melee Weapon Attack: +8 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 9 (1d8 + 5) slashing damage, or 10 (1d10 + 5) if used with two hands.

actions.name: Shield Bash
actions.desc: Melee Weapon Attack: +7 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 6 (1d6 + 3) bludgeoning damage, and the target must succeed on a DC 15 Strength saving throw or be knocked prone.

actions.name: Commanding Shout (Recharge 5–6)
actions.desc: All creatures of Veyne’s choice within 30 ft. that can hear him must make a DC 14 Wisdom saving throw or be frightened until the end of their next turn.

bonus_actions.name: Tactical Orders
bonus_actions.desc: Veyne shouts a command to an ally within 30 ft., allowing them to move up to half their speed or make one weapon attack as a reaction.

reactions.name: Parry
reactions.desc: Veyne adds +3 to his AC against one melee attack that would hit him. To do so, he must see the attacker and be wielding a melee weapon.

traits.name: Tactical Command
traits.desc: As a bonus action, Halna can shout orders. One allied creature within 30 feet can move up to half its speed or make one weapon attack as a reaction.

traits.name: Disabling Strikes
traits.desc: Halna’s melee attacks are precise and aim to disable. On a hit, the target must succeed on a DC 13 Strength saving throw or be knocked prone or disarmed (Halna’s choice).

traits.name: Measured Response
traits.desc: When Halna reduces a creature to 0 HP, she can choose to leave them unconscious and stable instead of killing them.

actions.name: Multiattack
actions.desc: Halna makes two melee attacks with her reinforced baton or one attack and one shove.

actions.name: Reinforced Baton
actions.desc: Melee Weapon Attack: +5 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 6 (1d8 + 2) bludgeoning damage and the target must succeed on a DC 13 Constitution saving throw or be stunned until the end of its next turn.

actions.name: Net Toss
actions.desc: Ranged Weapon Attack: +4 to hit, range 5/15 ft., one Medium or smaller creature. Hit: Target is restrained (escape DC 12).

bonus_actions.name: Guard's Presence
bonus_actions.desc: Once per short rest, Halna can grant herself and up to 2 allies advantage on saving throws against being charmed or frightened until the end of her next turn.

reactions.name: Shield Interpose
reactions.desc: When a creature within 5 feet is targeted by an attack, Halna can impose disadvantage on the roll using her shield.

traits.name: Petrifying Gaze
traits.desc: If a creature starts its turn within 30 feet and the basilisk can see it, the basilisk can force it to make a DC 13 Constitution saving throw. On a failed save, the creature begins to turn to stone and is restrained. It must repeat the save at the end of its next turn. On a second failure, it is petrified for 24 hours. On a success, the effect ends.

traits.name: Toxic Bloom
traits.desc: When the basilisk is first bloodied (below half HP), arcane sap leaks from old scars. The area in a 10-foot radius around it becomes difficult terrain until the end of its next turn as sticky, glowing fluid seeps out. The glow fades quickly, but leaves behind a strange fungal scent.

traits.name: Magic Tainted
traits.desc: Detect Magic reveals a chaotic aura of nature and shadow magic leaking from the creature.

actions.name: Bite
actions.desc: Melee Weapon Attack: +5 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 10 (2d6 + 3) piercing damage plus 7 (2d6) poison damage.

monsters.name: Hollow Dreamer
monsters.damage_resistances: psychic; bludgeoning, piercing, slashing from nonmagical attacks

traits.name: Hovering
traits.desc: The Hollow Dreamer hovers and does not fall unless forced downward.

traits.name: Phase Shift
traits.desc: When reduced to 70 HP, the Hollow Dreamer immediately triggers its Phase Transition (see encounter notes).

traits.name: Dream-Form
traits.desc: The Hollow Dreamer can move through other creatures and objects as if they were difficult terrain. It takes 5 psychic damage if it ends its turn inside an object.

actions.name: Multiattack
actions.desc: The Hollow Dreamer makes two attacks: one Claw and one Psychic Lash.

actions.name: Claw
actions.desc: Melee Weapon Attack: +6 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 9 (2d4+4) slashing damage.

actions.name: Psychic Lash
actions.desc: Ranged Spell Attack: +7 to hit, range 30 ft., one target. Hit: 14 (3d6+4) psychic damage.

actions.name: Psychic Ripple
actions.desc: One creature the Dreamer can see must make a DC 15 Wisdom saving throw, taking 11 (2d8+2) psychic damage on a failed save, or half as much on a success.

actions.name: Marked Ground
actions.desc: A 10 ft. radius area within 40 ft. erupts with psychic force. Each creature in the area must make a DC 15 Dexterity saving throw, taking 13 (3d6) psychic damage on a failed save, or half as much on a success.

legendary_actions.name: Nightmare Glare
legendary_actions.desc: One creature the Dreamer can see must succeed on a DC 15 Wisdom saving throw or be frightened until the end of its next turn.

legendary_actions.name: Shift Along the Ring
legendary_actions.desc: The Hollow Dreamer teleports up to 40 feet to another platform segment.

legendary_actions.name: Echo Knockback
legendary_actions.desc: One creature within 10 ft. must make a DC 15 Dexterity saving throw or take 6 (1d10+1) psychic damage and be pushed 10 ft.

legendary_actions.name: Shadow Echo (BA Phase 1 & Phase 2)
legendary_actions.desc: Tell (end of turn): A shadowy rune flares beneath a chosen PC; their silhouette detaches and forms a dormant echo. Resolution (initiative 20): If the echo (AC 12, 1 HP) was not destroyed, it manifests as a hostile Echo Shade (HP 15, simple mimic attack for 5 damage).

legendary_actions.name: Quadrant Mark (BA Phase 2 Only)
legendary_actions.desc: Tell (end of turn): One platform quadrant glows with spiraling psychic sigils. Resolution (initiative 20): The marked quadrant erupts. Creatures on that quadrant must make a DC 15 Constitution save, taking 13 (3d6) psychic damage on a fail, or half on a success.

monsters.name: Shadow-Double
monsters.damage_resistances: psychic; bludgeoning, piercing, slashing from nonmagical attacks
monsters.languages: understands the languages of its source but cannot speak

traits.name: Mocking Presence
traits.desc: Whenever the Shadow-Double hits a creature, that creature must succeed on a DC 13 Wisdom saving throw or take 1d4 psychic damage as its own face mocks it.

traits.name: Mimicry
traits.desc: The Shadow-Double can copy the abilities and attack patterns of its source PC, but deals only half damage. It cannot use spell slots above 1st level.

actions.name: Nightmare Strike
actions.desc: Melee Weapon Attack: +4 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 7 (2d6) psychic damage.

traits.name: Drowned Shadows
traits.desc: The crew can breathe water as easily as air. Their attacks drag foes downward when underwater.

traits.name: Copycat
traits.desc: When a PC casts a spell or uses a class feature, one nearby Mutiny Crew may attempt to mimic it (once per round). The mimic succeeds if the PC fails a DC 13 Charisma saving throw. The effect is a weaker shadow (e.g., half damage, reduced range, illusions instead of real effects).

traits.name: Nightmare Echoes
traits.desc: When reduced to 0 HP, the shadow-crew dissolve into bubbles and whispers. All within 10 feet must succeed on a DC 12 Wisdom saving throw or take 5 (1d10) psychic damage.

actions.name: Cutlass
actions.desc: Melee Weapon Attack: +4 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 6 (1d8 + 2) slashing damage.

actions.name: Drag Down (Recharge 5–6)
actions.desc: Underwater only. One grappled creature must succeed on a DC 13 Strength saving throw or be pulled 15 ft. deeper and begin suffocating.

monsters.name: Chain-Kraken (Dream Avatar)
monsters.damage_resistances: psychic; bludgeoning, piercing, and slashing from nonmagical attacks
monsters.languages: understands Deep Speech but communicates only in psychic whispers

traits.name: Untouchable Core
traits.desc: The Kraken’s head cannot be damaged directly. The encounter is resolved by destroying its tentacles. The head only withdraws when enough tentacles are destroyed.

traits.name: Tentacle Spawning
traits.desc: At initiative count 20 each round, the Chain-Kraken spawns 1–2 tentacles onto the ship (max 4 active). Tentacles act on the Kraken’s initiative count.

actions.name: Tentacle (see Tentacle statblock)
actions.desc: Tentacles lash independently. Each tentacle has its own AC, HP, and initiative tied to the Kraken’s.

mechanics.name: Choking Abyss (Every 3 rounds)
mechanics.desc: The Kraken begins a psychic chant. Circles of dark water appear on the deck. At the start of the next round, any creature still inside a circle is grappled and restrained by phantom chains until they escape (DC 15 Strength). The effect can be prevented by silencing or distracting the Kraken’s head.

mechanics.name: Shattermind Screech (Every 4 rounds)
mechanics.desc: The Kraken charges a psychic blast. At the start of the next round, unless disrupted, all creatures within 40 ft. must succeed on a DC 15 Wisdom saving throw or take 18 (4d8) psychic damage and be incapacitated until the end of their turn.

traits.name: Linked Existence
traits.desc: When a tentacle is destroyed, the Kraken takes 15 psychic damage. When all active tentacles are destroyed, the Kraken retreats beneath the waves and the encounter ends.

actions.name: Lash
actions.desc: Melee Weapon Attack: +6 to hit, reach 15 ft., one target. Hit: 10 (2d6 + 3) bludgeoning damage, and the target must succeed on a DC 14 Strength saving throw or be grappled (escape DC 14).

actions.name: Crush
actions.desc: Melee Weapon Attack: +6 to hit, one grappled target. Hit: 13 (2d8 + 3) bludgeoning damage and the target is restrained until the grapple ends.
